data.title: Landmark Legislation Requiring Independent Audits Of Utility Wildfire Mitigation Spending Before More Is Approved Passes Assembly Energy Committee, Says Consumer Watchdog
data.description: In Sacramento, California on April 8, 2026, the California Assembly Utilities and Energy Committee unanimously passed Assembly Bill 1774 (Boerner) with an 11-0 vote. This bill aims to address a major factor contributing to utility rate increases by mandating independent audits of Wildfire Mitigation Plan (WMP) expenditures prior to...

data.title: Vireo Growth Inc. Announces Acquisition of The Hawthorne Gardening Company from The Scotts Miracle-Gro Company
data.description: The recent transaction has significantly boosted the company's financial position, adding around $110 million in total between cash reserves and net working capital.

data.title: Virtuoso honors Travelex Insurance Services with prestigious supplier awards
data.description: In Omaha, Nebraska on April 8, 2026, Travelex Insurance Services Inc., a prominent provider of travel insurance to travel agencies, was honored with two awards from Virtuoso in the U.S. for the year 2026. The awards received were the Top-Producing Specialty Partner Award and the Highest Growth Specialty Partner Award. This recognition showcases Travelex's significant contribution to the travel agency sector and its impressive growth within the industry.

data.title: ATLANTA DREAM ANNOUNCE LANDMARK MULTI-YEAR JERSEY PATCH PARTNERSHIP WITH ALBERT, THE PERSONAL FINANCIAL ASSISTANT APP
data.description: In a landmark move for the franchise, the Atlanta Dream unveiled a groundbreaking four-year deal, marking one of the largest investments in team history. This partnership highlights Albert's dedication to empowering fans and athletes to secure their financial wellbeing. The announcement was made on April 8, 2026, showcasing a pivotal moment for the team's future growth and development.

data.title: Nxera Pharma Achieves Second Development Milestone in Collaboration with Eli Lilly Targeting Metabolic Diseases
data.description: In Tokyo, Japan and Cambridge, UK, on April 9, 2026, Nxera Pharma Co., Ltd. disclosed the attainment of a second development milestone in its collaboration with Eli Lilly and Company. This partnership focuses on diabetes and metabolic diseases. Nxera, listed on TSE as 4565, received an undisclosed payment from Lilly for meeting the milestone. While the specific amount remains confidential as per the agreement, Nxera's acknowledgment of achieving this milestone is a noteworthy advancement in its research and development efforts.

data.title: Vistra Prices Private Offering of $4.0 Billion of Senior Notes
data.description: Irving, Texas-based Vistra Corp. (NYSE: VST) revealed on April 8, 2026, the successful pricing of a private Offering. The Offering involves $500.0 million in senior notes that are set to mature in 2028 and were priced at 99.900% of their face value for the public.

data.title: Deep Blue Hotel & Hot Springs Australia Accelerates Operational and Guest Experience Benefits With Agilysys Technology Forward Solutions
data.description: Agilysys, a top global provider of hospitality software and services, shared news on their latest success in Victoria, Australia, and Alpharetta, Georgia. The company, listed as Nasdaq: AGYS, revealed that Deep Blue Hotel & Hot Springs, a renowned wellness retreat recognized for its rejuvenating hot springs and upscale lodging, has chosen and implemented a full range of Agilysys solutions for its resort activities. This includes services like spa treatments, hot springs encounters, and specialized activities, all seamlessly integrated into the resort's operations.

data.title: Telia將在收購Telness後部署Seamless OS
data.description: Stockholm - Telness Tech's parent company, Nordic Communications Group AB, today announced the sale of its subsidiary, the Virtual Mobile Network Operator (MVNO) Telness, to the Swedish telecommunications company Telia. As part of the deal, Telness will sign a long-term agreement with Telness Tech to continue using the Seamless OS technology platform, ensuring a smooth digital customer experience. Following the completion of the transaction, Telia will become the first mobile network operator (MNO) to deploy Seamless OS. "For us, the entry of Seamless OS into an MNO environment like Telia is a significant milestone. Our platform was initially developed and validated internally at Telness, making it one of the most advanced digital providers in Europe. With Telia acquiring Telness, this technology will continue to serve end customers," said Martina Klingvall, founder and CEO of Telness Tech and Nordic Communications Group. Prior to this announcement, Telness  had been...

data.title: Telia在收购Telness Operator后将部署Seamless OS
data.description: Stockholm - Nordic Communications Group AB, the parent company of Telness Tech, announced today the sale of its subsidiary mobile virtual network operator (MVNO) Telness to Telia, a Swedish company. As part of the deal, Telness will continue to utilize Seamless OS technology through a long-term agreement with Telness Tech, ensuring a seamless digital customer experience. Following the completion of the transaction, Telia will become the first mobile network operator (MNO) to deploy Seamless OS. "Incorporating Seamless OS into MNO environments like Telia is a significant milestone for us. Our platform was initially developed and validated internally at Telness, making it one of the leading digital operators in Europe. Following Telia's acquisition of Telness, this technology will continue to serve end customers. Telness will not only maintain its excellent digital experience but also benefit from Telia's valuable expansion and marketing capabilities," noted Martina Klingvall, the founder and CEO of Telness Tech and Nordic Communications Group. Telness has functioned as an MVNO until now.

data.title: ORVANA REPORTS INITIAL RESULTS FROM DEEP DRILLING PROGRAM AT TAGUAS
data.description: The company with trading symbols TSX: ORV and OTCQX: ORVMF is currently conducting drilling activities on the initial deep drill hole (TADD-278) located at the Taguas property in Argentina. As of April 7, the drill has made significant progress, reaching a depth of about 1,326 meters. The main goal of the company is to continue advancing the drill hole to achieve the maximum possible depth.
